title: Add Polinations-AI-Chat for Obsidian to Chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Notes get smarter
gist.blurb: Obsidian users, rejoice! You can now chat with AI and generate images directly inside your vaults.
gist.summary: Added 'Polinations-AI-Chat for Obsidian' to the app showcase, enabling AI chat and image generation within the Obsidian note-taking tool.
gist.impact: Obsidian users can now leverage Pollinations AI directly in their workflow without leaving the app.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a large, magical book representing Obsidian (purple crystal motif). The book is open, showing chat bubbles and images appearing on the pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot writing in a large open journal with a glowing purple crystal on the cover. The pages show pixelated chat bubbles and images appearing. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
